member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerExtensions
member.summary: DI and pipeline registration for the Jewelix logging library.

member.name: F:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerExtensions.OutputTemplate
member.summary: The standard Serilog output template used by . Includes timestamp, level, request/correlation IDs, elapsed milliseconds, and the structured HTTP message. Reference this constant when configuring additional sinks (e.g. file) in appsettings.json to keep all sinks consistent.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerExtensions.AddJewelixLogger(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the Serilog-backed adapter so the rest of the application can keep depending on Microsoft.Extensions.Logging while we control the underlying sink configuration. Idempotent: any prior ILogger<> registration is removed before our own is added.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerExtensions.UseJewelixLogger(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures the static from the application's appsettings.json (the Serilog section) and registers . A Console sink using is always wired in; additional sinks (e.g. File) should be configured via appsettings.json. The configuration source is the single source of truth for minimum levels — a missing or invalid Serilog section will surface as a configuration error at startup.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware
member.summary: Captures HTTP request/response metadata and, when Debug logging is enabled, the bodies as well. Each request scope decorates every log event with the correlation id (read from or assigned to the X-Correlation-ID header) and pushes ElapsedMs onto around the summary event so the configured outputTemplate can render it.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware.SensitiveFieldRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
("(?:password|token|secret|creditCard|apiKey)"\\s*:\\s*")[^"]*(")
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match '"'.
○ Match with 5 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ww].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match '"'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '"'.
○ Match a character other than '"' atomically any number of times.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match '"'.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: Initialises the middleware with the next in the pipeline.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware.Invoke(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Middleware entry point. Assigns or propagates the correlation ID, delegates to the body-capture path when Debug logging is enabled, and emits an HTTP summary log event with ElapsedMs on the normal (non-Debug) path.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware.InvokeWithBodyCaptureAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch)
member.summary: Debug-level path: reads and logs the request body, swaps the response stream for a to capture the response body, then restores the original stream and copies the captured bytes back to the caller.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware.ReadRequestBodyAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Reads the request body into a string, enabling buffering first so the body can be re-read by subsequent middleware. Returns for non-text content types or bodies that exceed the logging threshold.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware.IsTextLike(System.String)
member.summary: Returns when is a text-based media type (JSON, XML, form-encoded, or any text/* variant) that is safe to read as a UTF-8 string for logging.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.LoggerMiddleware.Sanitize(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Truncates to characters and replaces the values of known sensitive JSON fields (password, token, secret, creditCard, apiKey) with ***MASKED***. Safe to call with an empty string.

member.name: T:Jewelix.Logging.SerilogLogger`1
member.summary: Adapts calls to Serilog while keeping the contextual Log.ForContext<T> binding so each log event is stamped with the calling type as SourceContext.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.SerilogLogger`1.BeginScope``1(``0)
member.summary: Begins a logical scope by pushing onto the Serilog as a Scope property. Dispose the returned handle to pop the scope.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.SerilogLogger`1.IsEnabled(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel)
member.summary: Returns when is or when the underlying Serilog logger has that level disabled; otherwise.

member.name: M:Jewelix.Logging.SerilogLogger`1.Log``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,``0,System.Exception,System.Func{``0,System.Exception,System.String})
member.summary: Formats via and writes the resulting message (and optional ) to the Serilog pipeline at the mapped log level. No-ops when is or the underlying Serilog level is disabled.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the SensitiveFieldRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SensitiveFieldRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_indexOfAnyStrings_OrdinalIgnoreCase_2148917F25D062F9449235C38DC133F50DB8E59B7ECD589574E113872D1132CB
member.summary: Supports searching for the specified strings.
